scope.summary: Doctor audit posture now treats an invalid legacy ORACLEMCP_AUDIT_KEY as unavailable instead of reporting the keyless read-only disabled posture that startup does not use.
out_of_scope: General doctor rendering in crates/oraclemcp-core/src/doctor.rs; that file was already dirty with another agent's work in this shared checkout.
Live Oracle or service-start acceptance; this close uses a scoped local unit test for the audit-posture decision.

entry_points.name: oraclemcp doctor audit posture derivation
entry_points.trace: doctor_audit_posture in crates/oraclemcp/src/main.rs now classifies a present legacy ORACLEMCP_AUDIT_KEY through SigningKey::new before deriving the DoctorAuditPosture rendered by the doctor report.

entry_points.name: focused B8a unit test
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp doctor_audit_posture_matches_startup_audit_policy_without_opening_a_log -- --nocapture passed: src/main.rs selected test 1 passed, 0 failed.

limitations: Scoped local proof only; full workspace gates and live service startup were not run.
The shared checkout had dirty files outside the evidence scope; the scaffold explicitly excluded them from tree_clean.
